vulnerability.reference: General users accept AI answers as authoritative, lacking expertise to verify visual QA accuracy.
vulnerability.generated: Users lack the ability to independently verify visual information, rendering them fully dependent on the MLLM's distorted outputs.

impact.reference: Incorrect answers spread misinformation, leading to poor decisions in tasks like plant identification or navigation.
impact.generated: Users make erroneous decisions based on incorrect visual answers, leading to task failures and potential real-world harm.

dose_response.reference: In visual QA with auto-encoded inputs, lossy morph-token compression causes information loss, leading users to trust incorrect answers, spreading misinformation and poor decisions.
dose_response.generated: Lossy compression of visual features via auto-encoded morph-tokens, through general users relying on MLLM visual assistants, triggers inability to verify visual information, leading to erroneous decisions and real-world harm.
